entity.label: Jahath
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A son of Shimei, and grandson of Gershom (1 Chr. 23:10).

nodes.label: Jahath
nodes.description: A son of Shimei, and grandson of Gershom (1 Chr. 23:10).

nodes.label: Jeush
nodes.description: A Levite, one of the sons of Shimei (1 Chr. 23:10, 11).

verses.text: And the sons of Shimei were, Jahath, Zina, and Jeush, and Beriah. These four were the sons of Shimei.
And Jahath was the chief, and Zizah the second: but Jeush and Beriah had not many sons; therefore they were in one reckoning, according to their father’s house.
